title: Repair Station
description: Adds a new repair station functional block: consumes flint - repairs tools/armor.
body:
Adds a new functional block to the game: a repair station. The station automatically repairs 1 piece of armor/tool using flint. 1 flint is used for 80 seconds, regenerating 80 durability. The station supports hoppers.

Crafting recipe:
![flint | stone_slab |  flint on top, 6 planks on bottom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7541723faedb8c8314cb3f8ab8496d6c6479ec30.png)

Configurable via config and mod menu, supports adding any modded "fuel" and changing it's duration etc.

_I hope this mod will make Mending enchantment less necessary for your survival!_

**Can be used with Sinytra Connector!**
